ipa: /藢t蕛忙t d蕭i藧 蓻l 藞蓻m/
notes: Zhipu AI / Tsinghua KEG open bilingual model series. Name = "Chat" + GLM, where GLM is an initialism for "General Language Model" spoken letter-by-letter: chat-G-L-M, NOT read as a word "glim". STRESS: chat-jee-ell-EM (final letter takes the beat). Bare "GLM" is already in the dict; this is the searched product name.
